items.text: Hi Marcus, please note that my office hours move to Thursday, 2:00-4:00 p.m. this week in Bell Hall, Room 218. Bring the $5 printing fee for your draft so I can mark it up in person with you. See you then. Best, Dr. Lowell

questions.stem: According to the email, where will the office hours be held this week?
questions.explanation: The email specifies the office hours are 'in Bell Hall, Room 218.'

questions.stem: According to the email, what should Marcus bring?

options.A: A printed copy of the syllabus

questions.explanation: The email asks Marcus to 'bring the $5 printing fee for your draft.'

items.text: NOTICE: The Route 3 campus shuttle will be detoured from March 9 to March 13 due to roadwork on Carver Drive. Temporary stops will be added at Eldon Library and South Lot B. Riders are advised to allow extra travel time during this period.

questions.stem: According to the notice, why is the shuttle being detoured?

options.A: Because of a scheduled campus event
options.B: Because of roadwork on Carver Drive
options.C: Because of a shortage of drivers

questions.explanation: The notice states the detour is 'due to roadwork on Carver Drive.'

questions.stem: In the notice, the word "detoured" is closest in meaning to
questions.explanation: A shuttle that is 'detoured' is rerouted around an obstacle, here the roadwork.

items.text: NOTICE: Unclaimed items held in the Student Center Lost and Found will be donated to charity after Friday, April 18. Owners may retrieve belongings at the Information Desk, Room 110, weekdays before 5:00 p.m. Proof of ownership is required before any item is released.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what will happen to items left after the deadline?

options.A: They will be stored in a locker
options.B: They will be given to charity
options.C: They will be sold at auction

questions.explanation: The notice states unclaimed items 'will be donated to charity after Friday, April 18.'

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is needed to collect a belonging?
questions.explanation: The notice says 'proof of ownership is required before any item is released.'

items.text: Hi Priya, the book you requested through interlibrary loan has arrived at the Hartley Library circulation desk. It's due back in three weeks, and a late return adds a $2 daily charge. Please pick it up by Tuesday, June 30. Thanks, Library Services

questions.stem: According to the email, where can Priya collect the book?

options.A: At the Hartley Library circulation desk

questions.explanation: The email states the book 'has arrived at the Hartley Library circulation desk.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about returning the book late?

options.A: It will cost the borrower money
options.B: It will block future loan requests
options.C: It will require a written explanation
options.D: It will shorten the next loan period

questions.explanation: Because 'a late return adds a $2 daily charge,' returning it late will cost the borrower money.
